message:
fix(missions): stale closure, reconcile reset, ref initialization (#6782-#6784) (#6791)

- #6782: extractJSON is module-level pure function — added clarifying
  comment to dependency array (false positive, no code change needed)
- #6783: Reset staleReconcileDoneRef.current in reset() so cluster
  reconciliation runs again on second wizard use
- #6784: Initialize prevProjectNamesRef with empty string instead of
  computed snapshot to avoid stale initial value from useRef

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
